title: Rodian batwing
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rodian batwing''' was a flying creature native to [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. [[Xaverri]] used a flock of Rodian batwings in her magic act, transporting them from on [[glassine]] cage to another in a burst of smoke and flame.<ref name="THG">''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''</ref> One of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Senatorial]] critics claimed to be being chased by a flame-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]], [[Snake/Legends|snake]]-[[Tongue/Legends|tongued]] Rodian batwing when he was found on the roof of the [[Imperial Galactic Bank/Legends|Imperial Bank]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The critic was suffering from dementia induced by being [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] by a [[Scarab Mark VI assassin droid]].<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
